reviews.comment:
Lindo che pero  las Naftas de YPF Pistonean tanto la super ES COMO LA COMÚN DE LOS 70  muy mala y la infinia muy mala Pistonea en mis 2 autos no solo en este ACA SINO EN TODAS Y EN LAS REDES YPF Saludos

(Translated by Google)
Nice, man, but YPF gasoline is so bad it knocks. The Super is like the regular gasoline from the '70s, really bad, and the Infinia is really bad too. It knocks in both my cars, not just here, but in all of them, and on all the YPF networks. Greetings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRa0tMa1hnEAE
